title: Email and Phone Validation Module
summary: A Python module that validates email addresses and formats phone numbers according to specified rules.

user_stories.title: Validate an email address
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want to validate an email address to ensure it follows the correct format.
acceptance_criteria: The module should check for the presence of '@' symbol
The module should verify that the domain part exists
The module should reject invalid characters in the email address
The module should return a boolean indicating validity

user_stories.title: Format a phone number
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want to format a phone number into a standard format for display or storage.
acceptance_criteria: The module should accept a phone number as a string
The module should remove non-numeric characters
The module should format the number as (XXX) XXX-XXXX
The module should handle numbers with or without country codes

user_stories.title: Handle edge cases in validation
user_stories.description: As a developer, I want the module to handle edge cases such as empty strings or malformed inputs.
acceptance_criteria: The module should return False for empty or null input
The module should not crash on invalid input
The module should provide clear error messages where applicable

non_functional_requirements.requirement: The module should process validation and formatting within 10ms per operation
The module should be robust against invalid or unexpected input
The code should be well-documented and follow PEP8 style guidelines
The module should be easily extendable for future validation rules or formatting options

constraints: The module must be written in Python 3.8 or higher
No external libraries should be used for core validation logic
assumptions: The user will provide valid input strings for validation and formatting
Phone numbers will contain only digits and optional separators
out_of_scope: Sending emails or making API calls
Storing validated data or formatted numbers
Supporting international phone number formats beyond basic US format
tech_stack_preferences: Standard library only for core functionality
